……ん。うぅ～～ん……。<br>……あれ？ ここは、どこでありますか……？: Mmm... mmm... Huh? Where am I...?
目を覚ましたか。お前があのまま眠ったから、部屋を借りてる。<br>初めてだったの:
You're awake. When you passed out like that, I rented a room. I'm
sorry I pushed you too hard—it was your first time.
……あっ！ い、いえいえっ、司令官殿が悪いわけではないのですっ！<br>司令官殿:
Ah! N-no, no, it's not the Commander's fault at all! Thanks to you,
Commander, I felt so at ease, and... well...!
と、とっても素敵な体験でした！: I-it was a really, really wonderful experience!
……あの、司令官殿。司令官殿に抱いていただいて、考えたのですが……。<br>わた:
Um, Commander... After you so kindly embraced me, I've been
thinking... I want to work at the Brothel, I do.
司令官殿からいただいた温もり……とてもホッとして、心が満たされたのです。<br>:
The warmth I received from you, Commander... it filled my heart with
relief. I think that's what the people fighting in the Abyss need!
……なるほどな。けど、娼婦はそんなに甘い仕事じゃないぞ。<br>本当に、お前にで:
I see... But being a Courtesan isn't that easy. Can you really handle
it? Honestly, I don't think you're cut out for it.
そ、それは……。確かに、さっきも気を失ってしまいましたし……。<br>でもっ、わ: W-well... It's true I fainted earlier... But I'll work hard, I will!
話は聞いたわ。これだけやる気があるんだから、<br>挑戦させてみたらどう？ 意外:
I heard everything. Since she's this determined, why not let her give
it a shot? She might surprise you.
……まあ、ルディアがそこまで言うなら、いいだろう。<br>ただし、ベティ、無理は:
Well, if Ludia's vouching for you, then fine. But Betty, don't overdo
it. I don't intend to exploit women.
は、はいっ！ ありがとうございます、司令官殿！<br>精一杯頑張るでありますっ！: Y-yes! Thank you so much, Commander! I'll give it my all, I will!
それじゃあ、さっそく衣装を用意しましょう。<br>あなたに似合うのを用意してあげ:
Well then, let's get you an outfit right away. I'll find one that suits
you!♪
